title: The Fairness Trap
author: Meridian
medium: Data instrument / confusion matrices + dual-metric bar chart
embodies: COMPAS recidivism prediction and the mathematical impossibility of simultaneous fairness — Broward County, Florida 2013–2014. ProPublica and Northpointe were both right. Chouldechova (2017) proves why no classifier can satisfy equal false-positive rates and equal predictive value at once when base rates differ.
description: COMPAS recidivism prediction and the mathematical impossibility of simultaneous fairness — Broward County, Florida 2013–2014. ProPublica and Northpointe were both right. Chouldechova (2017) proves why.
form: confusion matrices + dual-metric bar chart + constraint theorem
